<?php namespace Illuminate\Notifications\Messages; use Illuminate\Bus\Queueable; class BroadcastMessage { use Queueable; /** * The data for the notification. * * @var array */ public $data; /** * Create a new message instance. * * @param array $data */ public function __construct(array $data) { $this->data = $data; } /** * Set the message data. * * @param array $data * @return $this */ public function data($data) { $this->data = $data; return $this; } }
